name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 40 still no verified public appearance. BUT: SNSC statement explicitly invokes 'guidance of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei' for the ceasefire acceptance — first official Iranian state assertion of his functional authority since Day 1. Direct counter-narrative to ToI 'unconscious in Qom' (REPORTED, single adversarial source) and ISW IRGC-military-council assessment. Three readings: (1) recovering and functional, (2) institutional fig-leaf for IRGC decision, (3) partial recovery. Iran's military obeyed cease-fire orders within ~2 hours — at least one chain of command is functional. Trigger 'appears on video/audio' remains UNFIRED. Watch for televised appearance over next 48-72 hours.

signals.content: Appointed Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. Selected over other candidates. His personal loss (family killed) may drive hardline stance.

First statement read on Press TV by anchor (no video/audio of Khamenei himself). Called for national unity, Hormuz to remain closed, US bases to be attacked. Nearly 2 weeks in, no visual confirmation of new leader.

Day 29 of conflict — still no video or audio recording of Mojtaba Khamenei released. His only communication remains a written statement read by a TV anchor on March 12. No Nowruz address (March 20). CIA/DIA testified in classified hearing that Iran is in a 'deep command and control crisis.' The 29-day absence is unprecedented for Iran's supreme leadership and could mean injury, extreme security measures, or internal power struggle. Absence is itself a significant data point — Tehran typically denies false claims within hours, and the continued non-appearance amounts to tacit acknowledgment of leadership difficulties. (Sources: CNN analysis, Iran International, NPR)

Day 31+ without video/audio — longest gap in 47-year Islamic Republic history. Soufan Center: US intel assesses 'very seriously injured.' 'No regime figure claims to have met or talked with him in person.' One US official: 'no proof he is holding the reins.' Senior Israeli official: same assessment. The Media Line: first statement (March 12) was 'dictated by IRGC.' Practical effect: IRGC is the decision-making authority regardless of which scenario is true (incapacitated, hidden, or dead). Any deal must be accepted by IRGC. Leaked audio about 'minor leg injury' not independently confirmed.

Day 34 of war, Day 25 since appointment as Supreme Leader on March 8. Still NO video or audio appearance. Iran's FM stated he is in 'good health' and 'may make public appearance in near future.' Russian envoy claimed he 'was still in Iran.' Al Jazeera published opinion piece (April 1) discussing 'rumoured injury or death.' Manifold prediction market (March 8-April 1) resolved NO on video proof of life — the market found no verifiable evidence of his public presence. IRGC has consolidated significant control: blocking Pezeshkian's appointments, controlling information flow to Supreme Leader, influencing appointment of top leaders. CIA/DIA 'deep command and control crisis' testimony remains uncontradicted by any intelligence service. CONFIRMED ABSENCE. (Sources: The Week India, Al Jazeera, Life News Agency, Manifold)

Day 35: Still no video or audio of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. Iran FM promises appearance 'in the near future.' CIA/DIA 'deep command and control crisis' testimony remains uncontradicted. Manifold prediction market reportedly resolved NO on video appearance. Written statements only, read by state TV anchors. The prolonged absence may reflect: (1) injury more severe than admitted, (2) security — avoiding targetable appearances, (3) internal IRGC control where military council holds actual power. Explanation 3 is supported by Ghalibaf/IRGC hawkishness diverging from FM engagement. (Sources: Iran International, Times of Israel, CNN)

Day 37 of war, Day 28 since appointment. Still NO video or audio appearance of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. FM's 'near future' appearance promise (from earlier in week) unfulfilled. CIA/DIA 'deep command and control crisis' testimony remains uncontradicted. No new information. Longest gap in 47-year Islamic Republic supreme leadership history. IRGC stream dominant in media space — F-15 triumphalism coming from IRGC, not supreme leader. CONFIRMED ABSENCE continues. (Sources: Iran International, Manifold, Soufan Center)

Day 38 of war, Day 29+ since appointment. AI-GENERATED FAKE VIDEO DEBUNKED: On April 5, account GBX_Press posted video on X claiming to show Mojtaba Khamenei 'heading to a military operations room' with Israel's Dimona nuclear reactor coordinates on display screen. DEBUNKED as AI-generated — fact-checkers identified 'blurred facial details, unnatural lighting patterns, and glitch-like transitions.' Frame analysis suggests older footage of Ali Khamenei digitally reused and overlaid. No Iranian state media (IRNA, IRIB, Tasnim) authenticated it. No international outlets verified it. The AI fake is itself significant — signals DEMAND for proof-of-life content that doesn't exist, creating a market for fabrication. Russian Ambassador Dedov (March 31): Mojtaba 'remains in Iran but refraining from appearing in public.' ZERO verified video or audio appearances. FM 'good health' claim remains unverified. CONFIRMED ABSENCE continuing.

Day 39 without verified public appearance (video/audio). All communications remain written statements only. Araghchi reassured on April 1 he is 'in good health' and 'expected to appear soon.' Russia's ambassador confirmed he 'remains in Iran.' Iran International (opposition-leaning) reported 'errors' in his first message that were 'dictated by the IRGC.' FDD analysis identifies Ghalibaf as one of '5 men now running Iran' — a former IRGC Air Force commander now leading negotiations. The real power center appears to be the IRGC-SNSC axis, not the Supreme Leader's office. Pezeshkian was SILENT on deadline day — may indicate civilian government sidelined. (Sources: Iran International, FDD, Al Jazeera)

DAY 39 — ZERO PUBLIC APPEARANCES. No public appearance. Iran International confirms statements continue to come via written messages read by state TV anchors. The April 5 GBX_Press AI-fake from yesterday (Mojtaba 'in operations room with Dimona coordinates') remains debunked. Day 39 of war, Day 30 since appointment, ZERO verified video/audio appearances. Russian Ambassador Dedov's March 31 statement remains the only diplomatic confirmation he is 'in Iran but for obvious reasons refraining from appearing in public.' Iran continues to fight a major war, conducting tripartite salvos and decapitation negotiations, while its declared supreme leader has not been seen publicly for 30 days. The command structure visible to the world is Araghchi (FM), Ghalibaf (Parliament Speaker), IRGC commanders. Whoever is actually in command, it is not visibly Mojtaba.

EVENING UPDATE: Times of Israel reported Mojtaba Khamenei 'unconscious and receiving treatment in Qom in severe condition, unable to govern' per diplomatic memo based on US/Israeli intelligence. ISW/Critical Threats separately assessed 'military council of senior IRGC officers has assumed core decision-making power' — mutually reinforcing. April 7 written statement on Khademi's death was again text-only (posted on X by proxy). HOWEVER: ToI report is single-source with adversarial intelligence basis — both US and Israel have incentive to portray Iranian leadership as incapacitated. Continued absence remains CONFIRMED FACT (Day 39). (Sources: Times of Israel, ISW/Critical Threats, Tribune India)

FIRST OFFICIAL IRANIAN INVOCATION OF MOJTABA KHAMENEI'S 'GUIDANCE' SINCE DAY 1 [REPORTED]. Iran's SNSC statement formally accepting the ceasefire stated the decision was made 'according to the guidance of Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and the approval of the Supreme National Security Council,' and that subsequent negotiations are 'under the supervision of the supreme leader and the highest levels of the system.' This is the first explicit Iranian state assertion of his functional decision-making authority since Day 1 — a direct counter-narrative to the ToI 'unconscious in Qom' report and the ISW 'IRGC military council assumed core decision-making power' assessment. Iran is asserting Mojtaba is functional even as no audio/video evidence is provided. Three readings: (1) He IS recovering and authorising decisions; (2) The IRGC military council is using his name as institutional fig-leaf while he remains incapacitated; (3) Partial recovery with limited functioning. Iran's military DID obey ceasefire orders within ~2 hours — suggests a functional chain of command at SOME level. The trigger point ('appears on video/audio') remains UNFIRED — written invocation by SNSC is not direct appearance. Day 40 still no audio or video.

edges.context: Day 34 of war, Day 25 since appointment. Still no video/audio. Manifold prediction market resolved NO on proof of life. IRGC consolidated control — blocking appointments, controlling information flow. CIA/DIA 'deep command and control crisis' uncontradicted. IRGC de facto running the country.
Explicitly stated Hormuz remains closed in his first statement. Personal commitment to closure as leverage.

trigger_points.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei appears on video/audio (proof of life and command) — UPDATE 2026-04-08: SNSC explicitly invokes his 'guidance' but written invocation is not direct appearance. Trigger remains UNFIRED. Day 40.
trigger_points.mechanism: Would confirm regime stability and leadership continuity. Absence fuels uncertainty about internal power dynamics.

trigger_points.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei signals willingness to negotiate
trigger_points.mechanism: Would be the most significant de-escalation signal. Would crash oil prices and boost equities.
